ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company associated with the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the contact */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the contact */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of the contact */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the contact */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the contact */,
  "phone1" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the contact */,
  "phone2" TEXT /* Secondary phone number of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the contact record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the contact record */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the contact */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the contact within their company */,
  "preferred_communication_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication for the contact */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the contact is active or inactive */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Additional tags or keywords associated with the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the company */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of the company */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the company */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the company */,
  "phone1" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the company */,
  "phone2" TEXT /* Secondary phone number of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "parent_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent company */,
  "annual_revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contact type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contact type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or logo associated with the contact type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_types_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_types_map_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES contact_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_types_map_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who communicated with the contact */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the communication */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject or title of the communication */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or result of the communication */,
  "attachment" TEXT /* File or document attached to the communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_history_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user's role */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the user is an administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the contact */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access or interaction */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Specific action performed during the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was added */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_category" TEXT /* Category or type of note */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up or next action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_notes_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)
